title: Anacreontic
content:
Born I was to be old,
And for to die here;
After that, in the mould
Long for to lie here.
But before that day comes,
Still I be bousing;
For I know, in the tombs
There's no carousing.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Anacreontic"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
